sc.fiji.snt.util.TreeUtils.EndpointClusterAnalysis

Package
Description
sc.fiji.snt.util
Miscellaneous SNT utilities, including classes defining reconstruction nodes.

  • Uses of TreeUtils.EndpointClusterAnalysis in sc.fiji.snt.util

    Methods in sc.fiji.snt.util that return TreeUtils.EndpointClusterAnalysis
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static TreeUtils.EndpointClusterAnalysis
    TreeUtils.analyzeEndpointClusters(Collection<Path> paths)
    Analyzes a collection of paths to determine which endpoint cluster (starts or ends) is more tightly grouped, suggesting the root location.
